title: thelypteris celebica
intro: Thelypteris celebica, also known as Celestial Maidenhair, is a species of fern belonging to the family Thelypteridaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Thelypteris celebica include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant is often prepared for medicinal use through herbal infusions, teas, and tinctures.
